theme: Long Commute vs. Small Apartment Near Work

sentences.english: Would you prefer living in a spacious home with a long commute or a small apartment close to work?
sentences.korean: 긴 통근의 넓은 집과 직장 근처의 작은 집 중 어느 것을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: I would choose the small apartment close to work without hesitation.
sentences.korean: 망설임 없이 직장 가까운 작은 아파트를 선택하겠어요.

sentences.english: Time is the one resource you can never get back and long commutes waste enormous amounts of it.
sentences.korean: 시간은 절대 되돌릴 수 없는 자원이고 긴 통근은 엄청난 양을 낭비해요.

sentences.english: Someone with a ninety-minute commute each way spends three hours a day just traveling — that's fifteen hours a week.
sentences.korean: 편도 90분 통근하는 사람은 이동에만 하루 3시간을 써요 — 일주일에 15시간이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Book That Changed Your Thinking
Long Commute vs. Small Apartment Near Work

theme: Long Commute vs. Small Apartment Near Work

sentences.english: That time could be spent exercising cooking healthy meals or simply resting.
sentences.korean: 그 시간을 운동하거나 건강한 식사를 하거나 단순히 쉬는 데 쓸 수 있어요.

sentences.english: A smaller space is a worthwhile trade-off for a significantly better quality of life.
sentences.korean: 더 작은 공간은 현저히 나은 삶의 질을 위해 가치 있는 교환이에요.
